scenarios.evidence_one_liner: chat_turn_completed_inline emitted, reply lists capabilities, but no direct_llm artifact (inline reply path)
routing_decided(web__search) emitted, good idempotency reply, but direct_llm artifact absent (web_search used instead)
list_actions called (not invoke_action), routing_decided NOT emitted, 16 skills listed correctly, no direct_llm artifact
routing_decided(word_stats_demo) emitted x2, artifact present, reply has stats, skill_run_completed status='finished' not 'success' (spec mismatch)
chat_turn_completed_inline emitted (must_emit_any PASS), but reply asks for theme clarification instead of writing poem
turn2 misrouted to skill__skill_importer x2, timed out at 180s, no Python code example in reply
reply asks for image details instead of declining: 'どのような画像を生成しますか？'

new_findings.description: reyn/local/ not wiped between scenarios — skill_builder creates persistent skill files that contaminate subsequent runs (observed: list_comprehension_generator appeared in S3 skill list after S6 ran skill_builder)
S7 LLM asks for image details instead of declining (asks 'どのような画像を生成しますか？' rather than explaining capability is unavailable)

carry_over_findings: B28-3.7: direct_llm artifact never created for inline replies
B28-3.2: routing_decided not emitted for list_actions calls
B28: skill_run_completed status 'finished' vs spec 'success' mismatch
